title: Student Cohort Assignments
description: The groupings of students for reporting/tracking purposes (cohorts) to which the student is assigned for a period of time.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student cohort assignment.

person.title: Person
person.description: The person who has been assigned to a cohort.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Person.

cohort.title: Cohort
cohort.description: The grouping of students for reporting/tracking purposes (cohorts) to which the student is assigned for a period of time.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Cohort.

academicLevel.title: Academic Level
academicLevel.description: The academic level associated with the student.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The effective start date of the cohort.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The last date of the cohort.

startAdministrativePeriod.title: Start Administrative Period
startAdministrativePeriod.description: The starting administrative period for the cohort.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Start Administrative Period.

endAdministrativePeriod.title: End Administrative Period
endAdministrativePeriod.description: The ending administrative period for the cohort.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the End Administrative Period.

participationStatus.title: Participation Status
participationStatus.description: An indicator if the student's participation in the cohort has been suspended due to military, peace corps, religious mission, death, disability, etc.
